name: Mirror
description: Native planar-reflection mirror blocks for Minecraft 26.2 (Fabric). Core has no hard dependencies; optional in-game settings via Mod Menu + Cloth Config.

custom.mirror:notes: Compatible with Sodium: during a reflection the mod points Sodium's terrain projection at the mirror's oblique projection so Sodium draws the reflected view (not the scene behind the mirror), then restores it. Iris is not supported (it replaces the render pipeline the reflection pass re-enters).
